ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Mario Torrigino, Esq., in court, for Carlton Paul, Executor.

At the court's query, counsel reports that he will be representing the Executor moving forward and advises that he submitted a Substitution of Attorney accordingly. After reviewing the court's register of action, counsel is advised that his filing was rejected by the clerk and is advised as to the reason it was rejected. The court notes counsel's CA State Bar Number as 092355. Counsel advises that the Inventory and Appraisal is with the probate Referee and will be filed forthwith.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-29-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Carlton Gene Paul, Petitioner in propria persona, appearing in-person;
No other appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court briefly stated that everything appeared to be in order and inquired if Mr. Paul understood the full scope of the duties if appointed. Mr. Paul stated that his husband was appearing in court with him today as support, that Mario Torrigino has been advising him, and that Mr. Torrigino is a retired attorney who might represent him in the future if needed. Mr. Paul stated that he paid some of the bills. Brief discussions are held. The Court stated that there can be no distribution without a court order, that any creditor claims will need to be paid, and that there are lots of steps involved in these types of matters. The Court noted for the record that no one was appearing to object.

There being being no objection, the Court proceeded with the petition as follows:

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.
The will dated 3/3/17 is admitted to Probate.
Carlton Gene Paul is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full IAEA authority.
Bond is not required.
Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.
A status hearing on the final inventory and appraisal is set for February 26, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.
A status hearing on close of the estate is set for October 28, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.
Order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
